note: bpmn_io is a graphical BPMN.io (bpmn-js) editor exposed as a Modeler plugin for modeler_api; model-owner modules (ECA, AI Agents) use it to edit their config entities visually. It has no settings form, permissions, or config schema. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, what does the bpmn_io module provide and which framework does it plug into so that ECA models or AI agents can be edited visually?
evals.expected_output: It integrates the bpmn-js (BPMN.io) graphical editor into Drupal's admin UI as a Modeler plugin for the modeler_api framework; model-owner modules like ECA and AI Agents use it to edit their config entities as BPMN diagrams.

evals.prompt: Does bpmn_io define its own plugin type? Which modeler_api plugin type does it implement, and what is the plugin id?
evals.expected_output: It does not define a plugin type; it implements modeler_api's Modeler plugin type (attribute Modeler, base ModelerBase, namespace Plugin/ModelerApiModeler) with plugin id `bpmn_io`.

evals.prompt: What Drupal module must be installed for bpmn_io to work, and what is the composer command to install bpmn_io?
evals.expected_output: It depends on drupal/modeler_api (modeler_api:modeler_api). Install with `composer require drupal/bpmn_io`, which pulls modeler_api, then `drush en bpmn_io -y`.

evals.prompt: The BPMN.iO modeler shows a warning and won't render under my custom admin theme. Which themes does it support by default, and which hook lets me whitelist another theme?
evals.expected_output: By default it supports the Claro and Gin admin themes (or subthemes of them). Implement hook_bpmn_io_supported_themes_alter(array &$supported_themes) to add your theme to the list.

evals.prompt: Where is the admin settings form for the bpmn_io module and what permissions does it define?
evals.expected_output: bpmn_io has no admin settings form (configure is null), no permissions, and no config schema of its own; you enable it and select it as the modeler from a model-owner module such as ECA or AI Agents.

evals.prompt: In what format does bpmn_io store the diagram, and which service converts that data into modeler_api components?
evals.expected_output: Diagrams are stored as BPMN 2.0 XML. The bpmn_io.parser service (Drupal\bpmn_io\Service\Parser) parses that XML into modeler_api Component objects and serializes edits back to XML.

evals.prompt: I have an existing ECA/agent config entity that was created without a diagram. How does bpmn_io turn it into a laid-out BPMN model?
evals.expected_output: The Modeler plugin's convert() method renders an empty model and attaches the entity's components/annotations/colors as drupalSettings.bpmn_io_convert plus the bpmn_io/convert library, which lays the components out on the canvas client-side.

evals.prompt: Which BPMN element does bpmn_io map a modeler_api ELEMENT (action) component to, and which BPMN element does a LINK (sequence) component map to?
evals.expected_output: An ELEMENT component maps to bpmn:Task and a LINK component maps to bpmn:SequenceFlow (per BpmnIo::SUPPORTED_COMPONENT_TYPES; START->bpmn:StartEvent, GATEWAY->bpmn:Gateway, SUBPROCESS->bpmn:SubProcess, ANNOTATION->bpmn:TextAnnotation).
